CheckTitle: CloudWatch Alarms are Set for DynamoDB Write Capacity Changes
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices/Runtime Behavior Analysis
Description: Ensure CloudWatch metric filters and alarms are set for changes to DynamoDB Write capacity to detect unauthorized or unintended changes.
Risk: Monitoring unauthorized API calls will help reveal application errors and may reduce time to detect malicious activity.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure CloudWatch metric filters and alarms are configured to monitor Write capacity changes in DynamoDB tables.
